mapper.select: SELECT * FROM T_NOTICE_TRAN WHERE USE_YN ='Y' AND DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') BETWEEN POST_STR AND POST_END
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_ASQ_TRAN ( USER_UUID , QSTN_TITL , QSTN_CONTS , QSTN_YMD , ANSR_CONTS , ANSR_YN ) VALUES ( #{userUuid}, #{qstnTitl}, #{qstnConts}, NOW(), #{ansrConts}, 'Y' ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE USER_UUID = #{userUuid}, QSTN_TITL = #{qstnTitl}, QSTN_CONTS = #{qstnConts}, QSTN_YMD = NOW(), ANSR_CONTS = #{ansrConts}, ANSR_YN = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT ASQ_SEQ , USER_UUID , QSTN_TITL , QSTN_CONTS , QSTN_YMD , ANSR_CONTS , ANSR_YN FROM T_ASQ_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userUuid} ORDER BY QSTN_YMD DESC
SELECT FAQ_SEQ , QSTN_CONTS , ANSR_CONTS , FAQ_GB , FAQ_ITEM_GB FROM T_FAQ_TRAN WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY FAQ_SEQ ASC
